name: Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of a large salad bowl well with garlic.
2. Wash and dry the spinach, then break it into small pieces.
3. Place a layer of spinach, onion, and cheese in the bowl; repeat until the bowl is filled.
4. Put a single whole clove of garlic on a toothpick and place it in the center of the salad.
5. Refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
6. When ready to serve, remove the garlic and add the 4 finely chopped hard-boiled eggs.
7. Toss with the dressing made from cooking oil, white wine tarragon vinegar, additional garlic, salt, black pepper (coarsely ground), paprika, and mustard powder.
